exemplar.title: Should some knowledge not be sought on ethical grounds?

detailedExemplarData.title: Should some knowledge not be sought on ethical grounds?

strengths: Three specific, real-world objects are clearly identified and situated in authentic contexts.
Links between each object and the ethical prompt are generally well explained and supported.
Justifications draw on academic and journalistic sources and make explicit reference to concepts such as consent, trust and power imbalances.
The title, prompt restatement and object headings provide a coherent framework and aid reader navigation.
Awareness of historical and modern ethical safeguards demonstrates contextual understanding.
weaknesses: Occasional imprecision in linking back to the prompt and some formulaic explanations.
Citation inconsistencies and occasional inaccuracies reduce academic rigor.
Analysis remains largely object-by-object without a unifying synthesis across all three examples.
Some suggested deeper engagement with TOK Ways of Knowing (e.g., language, emotion) is missing.
Concluding synthesis and consistent citation formatting are absent, limiting the exhibitionâs integration.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The exhibition meets all descriptors of the 7â8 band: three specific objects are contextualized and linked to the ethical prompt, with substantial justifications backed by sources. However, occasional imprecision in connections, citation inaccuracies and the lack of an overarching synthesis prevent it from reaching the top of the band. These factors justify placing it at the lower end of the 7â8 band, consistent with the examinerâs holistic mark of 7.

annotations.comment: The title and IA prompt are clearly presented, providing a strong framework for the exhibitionâs focus on ethical knowledge-seeking.
Consider explicitly linking this introductory statement on power/knowledge to each object early, to guide the readerâs understanding of the subsequent examples.
The prompt is restated clearly at the start of page two, ensuring the exhibition remains focused on the chosen IA question.
The description of Alexaâs data-collection processes is concrete, demonstrating clear real-world context.
The discussion on trust and misuse is relevant but remains descriptive. Clarify how surveillance transforms into an ethical knowledge issue.
To deepen the TOK analysis, reference specific Ways of Knowing (e.g. language, emotion) to explain how AI algorithms shape knowledge production.
The justification emphasises power imbalances and individual rights, aptly linking back to the promptâs ethical concerns.
The historical image of Blossom should include a clear source attribution within the main text to bolster academic rigor.
Selecting Blossom the cow personalises the historical experiment and grounds the discussion in a specific context.
The detailed recounting of Jennerâs vaccine experiment effectively situates the ethical dilemma in its original context.
The moral discussion is insightful but could better articulate how Jennerâs methods explicitly raise the question of whether certain knowledge should remain unpursued.
The discussion of modern ethical safeguards shows good awareness of how contextual changes affect the pursuit of knowledge.
Consider drawing explicit parallels between Blossom and Alexa to synthesize themes of power, consent, and context across objects.
The Rosetta Stone heading is bold and clearly differentiates the third object, aiding reader navigation.
While the Stoneâs role in translation is noted, the text would benefit from clarifying how forced removal specifically shapes what knowledge is accessible.
The discussion of cultural imperialism is well supported by sources and effectively ties removal to ethical concerns in knowledge production.
To deepen the analysis, reference how language as a Way of Knowing is monopolized through removal, reinforcing power asymmetries.
The final justification succinctly highlights the violation of cultural integrity, effectively linking to the promptâs ethical dimension.
The theoretical grounding with Foucault is solid, but it would benefit from a direct link to how these power dynamics manifest in each of the three chosen objects.
The image appears to be a stock photo rather than the studentâs personal Echo Dot. A photograph of the actual device would strengthen authenticity.
The object heading is concise and situates Alexa as a personal item, which frames the analysis effectively.
A concluding synthesis is missing. Before the bibliography, add a brief section comparing insights across all three objects to reinforce the overarching argument.
The bibliography demonstrates a range of sources, but citation formatting varies. Adopt a single style guide for consistency.
The news-article entry could be strengthened by providing a DOI or publisher information to improve source reliability.
The parliamentary report link appears duplicated. Verify URLs for accuracy and remove redundant entries to maintain credibility.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
